title: Design homepage mockup
description: Create high-fidelity wireframes for the new landing page, including mobile and tablet breakpoints.

title: Set up CI/CD pipeline
description: Configure GitHub Actions to run tests and deploy to staging on every push to main.

title: Write API documentation
description: Document all REST endpoints with OpenAPI specs and example requests/responses.

title: Fix login token expiration bug
description: Users are getting 401 errors after 1 hour; refresh token logic needs to be re-implemented.

title: Update dependency packages
description: Bump React, Next.js, and Tailwind to their latest stable versions and test for breaking changes.

title: Design database schema for payments
description: Create ER diagram and migration files for subscriptions, invoices, and transactions.

title: Implement dark mode toggle
description: Add a theme switcher that persists user preference in localStorage and respects system settings.

title: Write unit tests for utils functions
description: Achieve 90% coverage for date formatters, validators, and error helpers using Vitest.

title: Prepare Q2 performance review slides
description: Compile metrics, OKR results, and team feedback into a presentation for the leadership meeting.

title: Optimize image loading on product pages
description: Implement lazy-loading, WebP conversion, and responsive srcset for all product thumbnails.
